question.text: Exercise of a long put option in physical settlement results in:

answer.text: Cash payment to the put holder

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Exercise of a long put results in a sell position (security deliverable). The put holder delivers securities at the strike price. **The Trap:** Long put = deliver shares (sell position). Short put assignment = receive shares (buy position). **Cross-Exam Context:** Put option physical settlement is the mirror image of call option settlement. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Put buyer wants to sell at strike price, so they deliver securities on exercise.
